name: Banker Automotive
summary: General repair shop in South Austin. Not a Jeep specialist but personally used by the site owner for their 1996 Jeep Cherokee with good results.
jeep_friendly_blurb: General repair shop in Austin used by the site owner for their 1996 Jeep Cherokee. Not a Jeep specialist, but work quality was solid.

name: Banker Automotive Inc.
summary: One shop we have used for our 96 XJ Cherokee. Reliable and honest work. Mon–Fri 8am–6pm, closed weekends. First-come, first-served, no appointments. After-hours drop-off: park right of the commercial dumpster.

name: Collins Bros Jeep
summary: DFW Jeep-specialist yard with large XJ Cherokee parts inventory. Knowledgeable staff dedicated to Jeep-only inventory.
jeep_friendly_blurb: DFW Jeep-only salvage yard with a strong XJ Cherokee inventory. One of the best specialty yards in Texas for Cherokee parts.

name: Forged Concepts
summary: Custom 3D badges, overlays, and emblem work for automotive builds. Jeep-focused brand support and custom project runs.

name: PIDPLATES
summary: Custom emblems, badges, and decal solutions for vehicle enthusiasts. Known for supporting Jeep communities and creating custom logo pieces for clubs, including Midwest Krawlers. Perfect for bulk orders.

name: Tennessee Off Road, LLC
summary: Recommended Jeep driveline repair shop near Nashville. Specializes in 4x4 drivetrain work for XJ and other Jeep platforms.
jeep_friendly_blurb: Lebanon TN shop specializing in Jeep 4x4 driveline work near Nashville. Good for XJ owners needing drivetrain repairs.

name: DeXJ's
summary: Jeep-focused salvage and used parts source serving Tennessee builders.
